turtle/isdown.name: isdown
turtle/isdown.description: Return True if pen is down, False if it’s up. >>> turtle.penup() >>> turtle.isdown() False >>> turtle.pendown() >>> turtle.isdown() True

info.excerpt: Return True if pen is down, False if it’s up. >>> turtle.penup() >>> turtle.isdown() False >>> turtle.pendown() >>> turtle.isdown() True

turtle/isvisible.name: isvisible
turtle/isvisible.description: Return True if the Turtle is shown, False if it’s hidden. >>> turtle.hideturtle() >>> turtle.isvisible() False >>> turtle.showturtle() >>> turtle.isvisible() True

info.excerpt: Return True if the Turtle is shown, False if it’s hidden. >>> turtle.hideturtle() >>> turtle.isvisible() False >>> turtle.showturtle() >>> turtle.isvisible() True
